name: metro-relic-ios-bootstrap
description: Offline turn-based roguelite prototype ready for iOS wrapping via Capacitor.

scripts.verify:ci: npm test && node --check web/game.js && node --check web/game-config.js && node --check web/locale-bundles.js && node --check web/pure-grid.js && node --check web/victory-sfx-presets.js && node --check scripts/sync-web-to-docs.mjs && grep -q '</main>' web/index.html && test -f web/locale-bundles.js && grep -q 'locale-bundles' web/index.html
